titleStmt.title: SII 25.110: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 110. (A.R. No. 110 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This fragmentary bilingual record engraved in two scripts refers to the king as the last son of Rājēndra of the Chōḷa dynasty.

It states that while the king was seated on his throne Abhimānarāmaṉ in the western hall called Rājādhirājaṉ at Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḷapuram, he made a gift of the tax income from the villages Pottikkuḍi and Viḷakkamaṅgalam, both in Chōḷa-Pāṇḍya-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu in Rājarājappāṇḍināḍu to the deity Tiruttaḷi-mahādēva of Tirupputtūr. The gift was made on the advise of his mother when he saw the god in his dream.

The throne of this Chōḷa king is in all probability identical with its namesake at Tiruvāṉaikkāval which has figured in the record from Uyyakkoṇḍān Tirumalai (No. 462 of 1908). The hall Rājādhirājaṉ seems to be otherwise unknown.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.note: Read dinēśasyajjagam to suit the metre.
There is an un-necessary U mātra below si.
p.hi: bhūjjita śatru samghaḥ . tatrābhavanmānadhanāssamra khilabhūvalayaika nādhō rājēndracōḷa § pardditaśatrusamghaḥ . Ētēna yō gaśivapāda varāyaṇēna svarggan sa

śakradhanadāda tirisitēbhūḥ ..yaddantigaṇḍataṭaniḥ sratadānavāriyārā malīmasamabhūt surasindhūvāri . tasyātmajā Ānupamā mragarāja trdhyāḥ śśūrā babhūpuravanīpataya ssamraddhāḥ . tēṣāṅkanīyāndhātmārājyam pragha kramāgatam . Abhiṣēka tēmā cakrē virarājēndra Ityaya m . kōllāpura pramukhaśatru
p.note: Read dinēśasyajjagam to suit the metre.
There is an un-necessary U mātra below si.
p.hi: cchristhalīśam sassvapnēha ndraṣṭavānim . mātaram prāsasanmādhajitam sāvapra�ha . kvamākkraja . Āyuḥ śrījayasiddhyarttham pradēhi bhuvamādarāt ..ḷaktham bhūpavara ssavakīya jananī vātyēna

pūrvvakratām vihāgha matimān svābdē tritīyēpuri svāsthānēhyamāna rāmagaditē kratvāsanam sādaram ..cōḷapāṇḍyavaḷanāṭamathya gēlṛpōttikudyabhihitam ca pārkthivaḥ . grāma miritaviḷakkamaṅgalam śristhaliśavibhavēdiśattēlṛ . gōṣṭhigrāma grāmaṭikēkṣa

jalaprāyam sīmā pratyaksīmā pōtti kuṭēssāmi bhaisai ḷi kṣētram sōttarasīmē tyavavōbyam . paralūruṇimārabhya prāksīmā prāpya bhairavīm . tatōraṇḍa ramāgnēdhyāntitaḥ digupaśritā pratyak dakṣiṇabhāgatu saivatārā maṇittaḥ . cōḷa mārttāṇḍa viprāṇām kṣētram pratyaksimābhyavi . mamrūrkulaḷa ttūrmatyam^5^ syāmadīpyam calaṣabhyam ciram . sam

yam matām viḷakādyām mabhaḷāntām sanātanām . bibhratō bhūmibhāgasya sīmāsyāt paritaḥ kramāt Ētsat sīmabhyarūrjjitaḥ parivratō grāmau madra(nra)vēndrābalī nasyagrāma nivāsibhūsura muniprabtū mānām ghrayē . lakṣmisthalya thanāyakāyadiyōdhāddi
rāyasyatēlṛ sarvvēśvarāyākarau villavādhivati simbhala candrabhūṣaṇabuyapramukhastē Ātra karmabhiśu?bhēdhi kratāsta yaccakāra dra(nra)patiḥ parabhatō .
p.seg: nāḷ coḻapāṇṭiyavaḷanāṭṭu pottikkuṭiyum viḷakkamaṅkalamum Iṉṉāṭṭut tirupputtūr tiruttaḷi mahā
varkku veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mutal Iṟuppatāka
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka variyiliṭṭapaṭi yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupatiṉāl virame tuṇaiyākavum tiyākameyaṇiyākavuñ ceṅkolāccik karuṅkali kaṭi
var kaṅkai koṇ⎯⎯ melai maṇṭapam rājā
coḻavaḷa nāṭṭuc coḻapāṇṭiya nāṭṭup pottikuṭiyum viḷakkamaṅkalamum veḷḷāḷ vakaiyil mutal yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatiṉ mutal tavir
Ivvūrkaḷil pottikuṭi nilam Eḻeoṉpatiṉmāvaraiyiṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ kācu nūṟṟirupat tañcaraiye nālumāka kāṇiyum nellu Irunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟeḻukalaṉe tū⎯⎯
rikaiyiṉālk kāṇik kaṭaṉ kācu nūṟṟu Irupattiraṇṭe Eḻumākkāṇi mu

mum kaṅkaiyum kiṭāramum koṇṭaruḷiṉa Ayyar kekaṟṟiṉa vāṇṭu⎯⎯nellu Aññūṟṟeḻukalaṉe patakku nāṉāḻiyum muṉṟāvatu mutaliṟai kaṭṭi Ivviṟaiyum Ivvūrkaḷāl vaṉta Ūrkkaḻañcuṅkumarakakaiccāṇamum [ tamu teṟiyiṟai] taṭṭārppāṭṭamum Uḷḷiṭṭa kiḻiṟaip pāṭṭamum Uḷḷiṭṭa kiḻiṟaippāṭṭamum miṉpāṭṭamum pāṭikāvalk kūliyāḷ tiṅkaḷ moca mum valaṅkai makaḻmaiyum miṭaṅkai makaḻmaiyum velikkācuñ cevakkācu muḷḷiṭṭa A
rāyaṅkaḷum Innāṭṭut tiruppattūr tiruttaḷi mahātevarkku ve⎯⎯

div.p: Digital edition of SII 25.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
